channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.7.2
item.description: • New: re-transcribe a finished recording. Transcribe with the built-in Apple engine, later switch to Parakeet in Settings, then re-run it for a better result — from the recording's detail view, right-click in History, or the menu-bar list. Available whenever the audio is still on your Mac (dictations, which keep only text, are excluded).
